intent: To centralize and automate human resource management processes including payroll, recruitment, performance tracking, and employee data management to improve organizational efficiency.

entities.name: User
entities.description: Represents any individual interacting with the system, defined by roles such as Administrator, Manager, or Employee, governing access control and permissions.

entities.name: EmployeeProfile
entities.description: A centralized record containing personal information, job history, compensation details, and employment documents.

entities.name: PayrollModule
entities.description: The engine responsible for calculating salaries, tax deductions, and benefits, ensuring compliance with local financial regulations.

entities.name: RecruitmentPortal
entities.description: Manages job postings, applicant tracking, candidate screening, and onboarding workflows for new hires.

entities.name: PerformanceManagement
entities.description: A system for tracking employee goals, conducting reviews, and providing feedback to support organizational development.

entities.name: SelfServiceGateway
entities.description: An interface for employees to update personal information, request time off, and access benefits information.

entities.name: IntegrationService
entities.description: A middleware component that facilitates secure data synchronization with external accounting and communication platforms.

architecture.description: The architecture follows a centralized cloud-based approach where the Core HR Engine interacts with modular sub-systems. Administrators manage system configurations, while Managers and Employees interact via the SelfServiceGateway. Data flows through a security layer ensuring compliance with labor laws. Automated triggers connect the PayrollModule to external accounting software, while the IntegrationService maintains communication parity with existing corporate tools. All actions are logged and audited to ensure data integrity.

endpoints.summary: Update personal information via Self Service Gateway
validation_rules: personal_info must be a valid JSON

endpoints.summary: Retrieve payroll records for a specific user
Create new job posting or onboarding task
validation_rules: job_posting_details must be a valid JSON

endpoints.summary: Trigger data sync with external systems

rules.description: Ensure payroll calculation integrity by verifying employee status before execution
rules.logic: If EmployeeProfile.employmentStatus != 'Active', PayrollModule must exclude the record from the current salary calculation cycle.

rules.description: Enforce mandatory document onboarding for new hires
rules.logic: If RecruitmentPortal state transitions to 'Onboarded', EmployeeProfile must contain a minimum of two verified employment documents; otherwise, revert state to 'PendingDocuments'.

rules.description: Validate salary changes against organizational budget constraints
rules.logic: If compensation change > 20% of previous value, flag for Administrator approval via PerformanceManagement before updating PayrollModule.

rules.description: Ensure audit trail consistency for personal data updates
rules.logic: Every update made via SelfServiceGateway must generate an immutable log entry containing timestamp, UserID, and previous/current field values.
Upon successful completion of PayrollModule salary disbursement, IntegrationService must transmit summary ledger entries to external accounting platforms within 60 minutes.
